name: design-mastery
description: Complete design knowledge engine for visual design, UI/UX, web layout, Figma systems, Webflow/Shopify implementation, logo/branding, and design critique. Covers discovery through delivery: project scoping, mood boards, typography systems, color palettes, grid/spacing, UI components, design systems, responsive web, SaaS dashboards, scroll animations, Shopify themes, logo process, and systematic design review. Built from 10+ expert courses across 600+ transcriptions.
